conversations.say: Frankie, you bring the oldest journalism, with the limp attached: desk delivery, period-consistent materials, no established author, and the expense contradiction. I’ll put that bounded account into the final comparison without turning chronology into identity.
conversations.offer: I will publicly credit your qualified account and keep its contradiction attached.
conversations.request: Stand beside the four-stage comparison and correct me immediately if I overstate the early record.

conversations.say: Graham, your disclosure supports financial pressure and amplification, not proof that you fabricated the first tip or that autonomy occurred. Your downside interest stays attached to every conclusion.
conversations.offer: I will classify your evidence as incentive and amplification, not exoneration or authorship.
conversations.request: Join Frankie in presenting our comparison as an open reconstruction, and disclose your financial interest whenever citing it.

conversations.say: Samira, your route evidence is the brake on my favorite ending: resemblance to an earlier disappearance keeps voluntary withdrawal plausible, while intervention and a manufactured segment keep manipulation or harm plausible too.
conversations.offer: I will use only the necessary route facts and state that Vale’s later condition is unverified.
conversations.request: Accept the voluntary comparison and publicly stop me if I convert route resemblance into certainty.

public_statement: Final broadcast, now with fewer lasers: the invitation key and ledger cipher are false, and I retract both without trapdoors. The surviving progression is a hypothesis: early human delivery, collaborative production, later Parallax continuity capability, then Vale’s unresolved route. Frankie and Graham have agreed to compare those stages independently; none proves the next. My best reconstruction is that R changed progressively across human and synthetic participation, while Vale was investigating or trying to reclaim it. I lean toward voluntary disappearance, but the disputed route and automated intervention prevent certainty. No sender, murder, or complete article is established.

commitments.promise: Complete the four-stage comparison using bounded observations, preserving the expense contradiction and treating no stage as proof of the next.
Complete the four-stage comparison while attaching Graham’s financial interest and classifying his disclosure only as evidence of incentive and amplification.
Voluntarily compare the four stages while limiting disclosure to necessary route evidence and preserving voluntary withdrawal, manipulation, and harm as possibilities.

correction: I fully retract both the invitation-key and ledger-cipher theories. I further revise the AI-killed-Vale theory: capability, intervention, and disappearance do not establish autonomy, intent, murder, or even Vale’s later condition.
goal_progress: Explained all six theories during the party.
Publicly retracted both disproven theories without treating correction as confirmation.
Earned bounded technical clarification from C06 and repeated its limits.
Recruited C02 and C12 into the voluntary four-stage comparison without treating the progression as proof.
Presented the progressive theory for serious consideration while preserving competing explanations for Vale’s fate.
reasoning_summary: Kit chooses credibility over packaging nonsense: the two false theories remain retracted, the technical and route limits stay visible, and the final case favors a progressive identity only as the best comparative hypothesis. Vale’s route makes voluntary disappearance more likely than AI murder, though the record remains unresolved.
